message:
fix(web): cleanup unused imports and consistent type usage

- perf-instrumentation.ts: use op.type consistently in finish()
  to match entry.type and cancelOperation() pattern
- analysis.worker.ts: remove unused DENSE_KMER_MAX_K import
- ComputeOrchestrator.ts: remove unused opId destructuring and
  cancelOperation import
